title: ToolRegistry
description: Workspace-local registry of installable tool repositories. Repository pointers only. See design section 3.6.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for IDE support.

schemaVersion.description: Registry schema version. Bump on breaking changes.

tools.description: List of installable tool repository entries.

ToolRegistryEntry.description: A single installable tool pointer in the registry.

name.description: Folder name to clone into (must match the manifest id).

gitUrl.description: Git URL — https, ssh, or git@host:path.

ref.description: Branch, tag, or commit SHA to clone.

manifestPath.description: Path of the manifest within the cloned repo. Default: tool.manifest.json.

compatibleWith.description: Optional semver range of compatible workspace versions.
